titleStmt.title: SII 5.643: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 643. (A.R. No. 83 of 1895). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
—... svasti śrī . pū maṉṉi yāṇar poḻil Eḻulakum
tāmuṉ cey tavattāl parutivaḻit toṉṟiya
curataruveṉa cuṭarmuṭi cūṭi Irunilamakaḷai U
rimaiyiṟ puṇarntu tirumakaḷ paṇaimulaic ceñcān taḷaintu pa
rumaṇimārvam paṉivarai nikaṟpa jayamakaḷ ceḻuntaṇ cantaṉac
cuvaṭṭāl puya mirukayalaip poruppeṉa toṉṟi nāmakaḷ tāṉum E
ṅkomakaṉ cevvāyp pavaḷateyoḷi paṭait taṉṉiyāneṉat
tavaḷananṉiṟa taṉittuṭaiyeṉeṉa pukaḻuḻakiḻaḻ cintai makiḻ nāḷi
lum Orukuṭai nilavum porupaṭait tikiri veyiṉuṅ karuṅkali Iruḷiṉai
turappa niṭupal lūḻi Eḻkaṭaṟpuṟattalum koṭāc centaṉiko liṉi
tulāva miṉamuñ cilaiyun citaittu vānuyar poṉṉoṭu meruvil pu
li viṟṟiruppa Umpariyāṉai Oreṭṭiṉukkum tampameṉṉat taṉittaṉi
ticaitoṟum vi[ja]yasta mpa niṟpa paci pakai Ātiāṉatu titu ṉiṅka maṉṉu
yir taḻaippa manuvāṟu viḷaṅka (ta)mātavar tavamum maṅkaiyar kaṟpum Āti An
taṇa rākuti kaṉalum miteḻu koṇṭal vicu taṇalum metiṉi vaḷamu
m cāti yoḻukkamum niti Aṟamum Uṟaḻātu nikaḻapa pāvum paḻaṉap parappum pa
ṇaikkai māvu mallatu vantalai paṭutaliṉṟik kaṉaviluṅ kāṇṭaṟ karite
ṉa varunetip puṭaiyilum palaveṟu puḷḷilu mallatu ciṉaiyeṉappaṭuta liṉ
ṟi niṟaiperuñ celvamo ṭavaṉi vāḻa pallava teluṅka māḷuva kaliṅka kocalar ka
ṉṉar kaṭārar teṉṉar keraḷar ciṅkaṇar koṅṇar cetikar vaṅka raṅkar mattavar mattirar kaṅ
kar coṉakar kaiykayar ciṉareṉ ṟaṟaikaḻal ventarum Allāvaraicarum muṟaimaiyi
l varinta tiṟai kuṇarn tiṟaiñca Imaiyap poṟko
ṭiyamaiya civaṉaruḷ peṟṟu puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyā
ḷivaṉ tiruvuḷḷat taraṇimuḻutumuṭaiyāḷeṉa vuṭa
niruppa Orumaṇi vaṇ mel tirumakaḷ Iruntateṉa Ampoṉ malarko
ṭi cempiyaṉakiḻānaṭi Ivaṉ tirumaṇimārvat taruḷuṭa niruppa compon vira
siṁ hāsa ṉattup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovi
rā jakecaripanma rāṉa tribhu vaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ ṣrikulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku
yāṇṭu 10 5 Āvatu puvaṉamuḻutuṭaivaḷanāṭṭup poykaināṭtu U
ṭaiyār tirumaḻuvāṭiuṭaiyārkku cantirātittaval Iravupakal tirinuṉ
tāviḷak keriya Iruṅkoḷappāṭit tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyāṉ tirucciṟṟam
palamuṭaiyān Iruṅkoḷar Ivvāṭṭai makaranāyaṟṟu pūrva pakṣattu piriti
pa tamum viyāḻakkiḻamaiy peṟṟa Uttirāṭatti nāḷ vaitta tirununtāviḷakku
Onṟukku ney Uḻakkāka tirununtāviḷakku Iraṇṭukku
nāḷ Onṟukku ney Uriyāka nāḷ munṉūṟṟu Aṟupatukku veṇṭu ney nūṟṟu E
ṇpati ṉāḻikku viṭṭa cāvā muvāc cevvariyāṭu nūṟṟeṇpatum politakar
kiṭāy Iraṇṭum Ittevarkku muṉpu tirununtāviḷakku kuṭikaḷāy Ā
ṭu kaikkoṇṭu neyaḷaṉtu varukiṟa maṉṟāṭikaḷil Aravaṇai ve
ṇkāṭaṉ viḷakku kālukku kaikkoṇṭa Āṭu Irupattiraṇṭaraikku ney
Irupattu Irunāḻi Uriyum Uṭaiyāṉ caṅkaranāṉa kaṇṭarātittakoṉ viḷakku kā
lukku kaikkoṇṭa Āṭu Irupattiraṇ-raikku ney Irupat tiruṉāḻi Uriyum nampi
cuntaṉāṉa vaiyiccayaṉātakonRead viḷakku.vaḷakka Araikkālukku ĀṭuRead patiṉ.paninoṉṟe kālukku ne
y patinoru nāḻi Uḻakkum nampi kāri viḷakku munṟumāmukkāṇikkaRead ºkāṇikku.kaikkoṇṭa Āṭu
patināṟe mukkāle Araikkālukku ney patinaṟu ṉāḻi muvuḻakku Āḻākkum Ayannampi vayi
cciyanātakon viḷakku Araikkālukku Āṭu patin Onṟekālukku ney patinoru ṉāḻi Uḻa
kkum ciṟiyān tirumaḻuvāṭi viḷakku Arai kālukku Āṭu patinonṟe kā lukku Aḷakku ne
y pataṉ Oru ṉāḻi Uḻakkum tirumaḻuvāṭic cokka
koṉ viḷakku Araikkālukku kaikkoṇṭa Ā
ṭu patiṉonṟe kālukku Aḷakku ṉey patinoru nā
ḻi Uḻakkum kūttan maḻuvāṭi viḷakku Araikkālukku
Āṭupatiṉ Oru nāḻi Uḻakkum piccaṉ Āṉai viḷakku
(ku) munṟumā mukkāṇikku Āṭu patināṟe mukkāle Arai
kkālukku Aḷakku ney patiṉaṟu nāḻi muvūḻakku Āḻākkum
poṉṉārmeni vayicciyaṉātaṉ viḷakku mākāṇikku Āṭu Aiñcarai
ye Araikkālukku Aḷakku ney Aiñāḻiuri Āḻākkum coṟan tirucciṟṟam
palamuṭaiyān viḷakku mākāṇikku kaikkoṇṭa Āṭu Ai
ñcaraiye Araikkālukku ney Aiñāḻi Uri Āḻākkum coḷa
ṉ nātaṉ viḷakku Araikkālukku Āṭu patiṉoṉṟe kāṟukku
Aḷakku ney patiṉoru nāḻi Uḻakkum periyāṉ toṇṭanum māṇikka
n kuttan viḷakku kālukku kaikkoṇṭa Āṭu Irupattiraṇṭaraikku
Aḷakku ney Irupattu Irunāḻi Uriyum Āka tirununtāviḷakku Iraṇṭu
kku ṉāḷ ḷonṟukku ney Uriyaāka nāḷ munnūṟṟuaṟupatukku A
ḷakku ney nūṟṟu Eṇpati nāḻikkuk kaikkoṇṭa Āṭu ṉūṟṟe
ṇpatu politakar yiraṇṭum Ivai kaiykoṇṭu candrādi tta
val celuttakkaṭavomāka kaikkoṇṭu kal veṭṭivit
tom manṟāṭikaḷ Ivaṉaivom panmāheśbara ra kṣai—
Digital edition of SII 5.643 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
